- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	React + TypeScript with Vite was explicitly requested.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	Created the app in the current workspace root with the Vite `react-ts` template.

- [x] Customize the Project
	Updated the package name to `nomad-FR` and refreshed the README for this workspace.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	No extensions were required by the setup information.

- [x] Compile the Project
	Dependencies were installed and `npm run build` completed successfully.

- [x] Create and Run Task
	Created a VS Code task named `dev server` and started it successfully.

- [x] Launch the Project
	The project is running via the `dev server` task. Debug launch was offered and declined.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	README.md and this file reflect the current project state, and the HTML comments have been removed.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
